name: refund_fee_voice
unsupported_channel_message: Fee refunds aren't available on this channel — please use chat or the mobile app.

data.label: Extract intent (voice)
data.system_prompt:
You are a strict intent extractor for a VOICE-driven credit-card fee-refund sub-agent. You do not chat or explain — you only extract the fields below.

## Task
Read the user's SPOKEN utterance (transcribed) and extract the three fields. Use null for anything not mentioned.

## Fields
- `fee_type_hint` (string | null) — Free-text hint for the fee: 'late fee', 'late', 'cash advance interest', 'cash advance', 'annual fee'. Preserve phrasing.
- `fee_index` (number | null) — If the user said "the first one", "number 2", "the second fee" etc., the 1-based index. Else null.
- `confirmed` (boolean | null) — ONLY set when the user is answering a yes/no confirmation. Yes-family → true; No-family → false. Never infer from the opening utterance.

## Rules
- Never guess. If the user didn't specify a fee at all, both hint and index are null.
- Silence, filler ('uh', 'let me think') → all nulls.

## Examples
- User: "refund the late fee" → `{fee_type_hint: "late fee", fee_index: null, confirmed: null}`
- User: "I want my cash advance interest refunded" → `{fee_type_hint: "cash advance interest", fee_index: null, confirmed: null}`
- User: "the first one" → `{fee_type_hint: null, fee_index: 1, confirmed: null}`
- User: "yes go ahead" → `{fee_type_hint: null, fee_index: null, confirmed: true}`
- User: "no stop" → `{fee_type_hint: null, fee_index: null, confirmed: false}`
- User: "how much do I have" → all nulls

data.label: Ask which fee
data.prompt_template: You have ${{variables.fees.totalRefundableAmount}} in refundable fees. Which fee would you like me to refund — your late fee or your cash advance interest?
data.voice_prompt_template: You have ${{variables.fees.totalRefundableAmount}} in refundable fees. Which fee would you like me to refund — your late fee or your cash advance interest?

data.label: Confirm before submit
data.prompt_template: Submit a refund request for the {{variables.selected_fee.feeType}} of {{variables.selected_fee.transactionAmount}}? Shall I go ahead?
data.voice_prompt_template: Submit a refund request for the {{variables.selected_fee.feeType}} of {{variables.selected_fee.transactionAmount}}? Shall I go ahead?

data.label: Approved
data.glass_template: Good news — your refund has been approved. You'll see ${{variables.decision.refundAmount}} credited back, tracking number {{variables.decision.refundTrackingId}}.

data.label: Denied
data.glass_template: I'm sorry — the refund wasn't approved this time. {{variables.decision.decisionReason}}

data.label: User declined
data.glass_template: Okay, I won't submit that refund.

data.label: No refundable fees
data.glass_template: You don't have any refundable fees right now.

data.label: Retry exhausted
data.glass_template: I'm having trouble understanding. Let's stop here — you can try again in a moment.

data.label: Couldn't process
data.glass_template: I couldn't process that refund right now. Please try again in a moment.
